description_long: This sculpture depicts a life-sized, anatomically detailed male figure in a walking pose, with one leg forward and one arm slightly extended. The figure stands upright on a rectangular plinth, which serves as its base. The surface of the sculpture has a weathered, greenish patina, suggesting it is made of bronze or a similar metal that has oxidized over time. The facial features, musculature, and proportions are realistic, with attention to anatomical accuracy. The figure is nude, and the overall style is reminiscent of classical or modernist public art. The base shows some discoloration and marks, indicating exposure to outdoor elements.
description: A life-sized bronze male figure in a walking pose, standing on a rectangular plinth with a greenish, weathered patina. The sculpture is anatomically detailed and realistic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, chest, and left leg stepping forward, with the right arm bent and the left arm relaxed.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, torso, and the forward stride of the left leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, shoulders, and the right leg extended behind, with the figure's posture clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, torso, and the backward stride of the right leg.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is mounted on a plinth, suggesting it is intended for outdoor or public display, such as a plaza or park.
